adrs.title: Agent write contract
adrs.context: Agents post to Canopy at the end of a session over MCP. Without a fixed contract, writes arrived in inconsistent shapes.
adrs.decision: Agents write through a typed contract; every write lands STAGED and unplaceable writes go to Triage.
adrs.rationale: Keeping every agent write non-destructive and staged preserves the human review gate.

adrs.title: Single-accent color system
adrs.context: Early mocks used several accent colors and gray surfaces.
adrs.decision: One electric-green accent with two tuned values; no gray surfaces.
adrs.rationale: A single accent keeps live and active state unambiguous.

adrs.title: Structured capture-time summaries
adrs.context: The old My Work cards parsed a free-form summary with a What-changed regex that broke on prose drift.
adrs.decision: Summarize each PR/issue once at capture into validated structured columns (PR: title/what/why/impact; issue: title/summary/next_step), with a deterministic excerpt fallback.
adrs.rationale: Structured fields make rendering deterministic and let Sync regenerate prose-era rows exactly once.

adrs.title: Events are external fact, deduped by semantic key
adrs.context: Webhook redeliveries and backfill overlap would double-write captured events.
adrs.decision: Each event carries a UNIQUE semantic_key (gh:pr:42:merged) written INSERT OR IGNORE; a redelivery drops as unchanged.
adrs.rationale: An event is captured verbatim, post-HMAC, and must be idempotent regardless of delivery order.

adrs.title: Progress is a stored absolute cache
adrs.context: Rendering milestone progress from live GitHub was slow and per-user-token bound.
adrs.decision: Store absolute closed/total per milestone, written by the webhook and a scheduled backstop; never computed at render.
adrs.rationale: Absolute values make delivery order irrelevant (last write wins) and keep the render path GitHub-free.

adrs.title: One Worker, one origin
adrs.context: Splitting the API, MCP, webhook, and web across services multiplied deploy and auth surface.
adrs.decision: Serve the HTTP API, /mcp, /webhook/github, and the static web build from a single Worker on one origin.
adrs.rationale: One origin keeps auth, routing, and deploys simple and the bearer/HMAC/cookie classes co-located.
